creator: gad@FreeBSD.org
text:
At 11:21 AM +0900 7/16/03, kuriyama@FreeBSD.org wrote:
>It seems ports/31862 was already committed.
>
>Should we close this PR?

Oh.  Huh.  I forgot that this PR was still open when the
later one (with the better patch) was closed.  Yes, this
PR should be closed.  It would have also been resolved
as part of rev.1.410 of bsd.port.mk

--
